odoo_type: HTTP API (bidirectional push/pull via CommerceML XML); file-based exchange
next_type: REST API (bidirectional sync via Spring @Transactional); entity mapping table
gap: Odoo has CommerceML 2.10 XML protocol, file exchange, outbox cron (5 min). Next uses REST JSON API. No @Retryable, no idempotency keys. Missing: CommerceML XML compat, file exchange, outbox cron.

odoo_type: HTTP API to SBIS/Diadoc/Kontur; scheduled inbox/status polling; UPD/invoice/act/torg-12
next_type: REST API with SBIS/Diadoc/Kontur abstraction; document lifecycle with signing/rejection; partner mapping
gap: No scheduled polling cron for inbox/status in Next. No @Retryable on SbisService. Missing: inbox/status polling crons, exchange journal, retry logic.

integration_name: Bank API (Sberbank, Tinkoff, VTB, Alfa, Tochka)
odoo_type: Multi-bank HTTP API; OAuth2/certificate/basic auth; SBP support; scheduled sync
next_type: REST API with multi-bank provider config; payment order creation and reconciliation
gap: Odoo has 5 bank-specific clients, SBP support, 4 scheduled crons. Next has generic 70-line service, no bank-specific logic, no scheduled sync, no SBP, no retry, no tests.

odoo_type: SMTP outbound + IMAP/POP3 inbound; email queue with priority; digest scheduling
next_type: Spring JavaMailSender SMTP outbound; template-based emails; notification preferences
gap: Odoo has bidirectional email (SMTP+IMAP), queue cron, digests. Next has SMTP outbound only. Missing: fetchmail, email queue, digest scheduling, bounce handling.

odoo_type: Telegram Bot API via HTTP; webhook-based receive; on-call notification channel
next_type: Notification preference enum only; no actual Telegram implementation
gap: Odoo has full Telegram Bot API: send/receive/inline keyboards/on-call alerts. Next only has TELEGRAM enum, no implementation.

odoo_type: Outgoing webhook with HMAC; outbox pattern; incoming payment callbacks
next_type: Full webhook management: outgoing delivery tracking + retry; incoming code-based routing; delivery lifecycle
gap: Next has more structured system with delivery tracking and retry. Minor: no confirmed HMAC-SHA256 verification; no outbox cron.

odoo_type: Versioned REST JSON API (v1, v2); Swagger; API key auth; rate limiting; idempotency
next_type: Spring REST with role-based auth; no separate versioned external API
gap: Odoo has dedicated external API with versioning, Swagger, API key auth, rate limiting, idempotency. Next lacks: versioning, Swagger auto-gen, rate limiting, idempotency keys.

odoo_type: HTTP API to Renga BIM server; 3D model import/export
next_type: CRUD only; no external Renga API
gap: Odoo has direct HTTP integration with Renga BIM server. Next has BIM CRUD but no external API.

odoo_type: HTTP API to FNS (tax/counterparty), Rosreestr (property/EGRN), EGRUL (company auto-fill)
gap: Odoo has FNS, Rosreestr, EGRUL integrations. Next has none.

odoo_type: HTTP POST to LLM API; chat, analysis, task suggestion
gap: Odoo has broader AI: chat, analysis, task suggestions. Next has document analysis only. Missing: chat assistant, task suggestion.

odoo_type: Multi-channel: SMS gateway, WhatsApp Business API, Viber, email aggregation
next_type: In-app and WebSocket push; batch support; no external messaging
gap: Odoo has SMS, WhatsApp Business API, Viber. Next has in-app/WebSocket/push only, no SMS/WhatsApp/Viber.

odoo_type: WebDAV protocol; Synology FileStation REST API
gap: Odoo integrates with WebDAV and Synology NAS. Next uses local/S3 via CDE.

odoo_type: HTTP GET to external construction pricing database
gap: Odoo fetches live pricing from FER/TER API. Next uses local data only.

odoo_type: CryptoPro API stub; certificate expiry monitoring crons
next_type: Signing workflow in EDO; no CryptoPro
gap: Both lack production CryptoPro. Odoo has stub + cert monitoring crons. Next has signing workflow in EDO but no dedicated crypto service.

odoo_type: HTTP GET to weather API for daily log entries
gap: Odoo fetches weather data for daily log. Next has no weather API integration.

odoo_type: HTTP health checks to observability stack; Prometheus metrics
next_type: Spring Boot Actuator; no custom observability stack monitoring
gap: Odoo has custom ES/Prometheus/Jaeger health checks. Next uses Actuator out-of-box, lacks custom observability monitoring.

odoo_type: Outbox event pattern; idempotency keys; rate limiting with cleanup
next_type: Full sync management: job lifecycle (start/cancel/retry), bidirectional mapping, field-level config
gap: Next has structured sync with job lifecycle and field mapping. Minor: no outbox pattern, no idempotency key management.
